value: pnpm for monorepos, npm for single-package projects
vitest for TypeScript projects, pytest for Python
./verify.sh exits 0. No verify.sh = produce explicit verification step.
Always include 'closes #N' referencing the GitHub issue. Build must pass before commit.
Secrets in macOS Keychain only. Never .env committed to git, never in CLAUDE.md, comments, or logs.
better-sqlite3 v12+ required for Node v24. v9.x native build fails with make exit code 2.
pnpm v10 native build approval: set pnpm.onlyBuiltDependencies in root package.json. approve-builds is interactive.
